name: SaaS MVP
description: Launch a software-as-a-service product with subscription billing, user auth, and a landing page.

name: Mobile App
description: Build a cross-platform mobile application with native feel and app store deployment.

name: E-Commerce Store
description: Set up an online store with product catalog, cart, checkout, and order management.

name: Content Platform
description: Create a blog, newsletter, or media site with content management and audience growth tools.

name: AI-Powered Tool
description: Build an application leveraging AI/ML for intelligent features, automation, or content generation.

concept_sheet.success_metric: Product-market fit validated with 50 beta users

name: Community Platform
description: Build a community hub with forums, groups, events, and member profiles.

name: Creative Portfolio
description: Showcase creative work with a stunning portfolio site, project galleries, and contact form.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: Image optimization, responsive design, minimal CMS
concept_sheet.success_metric: Portfolio leads to 5 client inquiries per month

name: API / Developer Tool
description: Build a developer-focused API, SDK, or CLI tool with documentation and developer portal.

concept_sheet.tech_constraints: OpenAPI spec, rate limiting, API key management

name: Marketplace
description: Two-sided marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with listings, search, and transactions.

concept_sheet.success_metric: 100 listings and 50 transactions in first quarter

name: Blank Canvas
description: Start from scratch with a completely blank project. Define everything yourself.
